description: Sofi full-body mascot state assets for Mentora learning UI.

sizes.512: Default runtime size for side panels, cards, coach states, and compact mascot blocks.
sizes.1024: Large panels, high-density displays, or export-quality preview. Avoid in dense UI.

usageRules: Use 1024px only when the rendered mascot is larger than 256 CSS pixels.
Use expression avatars from /mascot/sofi/expressions for chat bubbles and small assistant icons.
Use alt text when Sofi communicates state; use decorative alt only when redundant with nearby text.
